21-24. EFFECTS OF RULERS OF 7th HOUSE/NAVANSA.
If the 7th House, or its Navansa be ruled by Saturn, the females husband will be old and foolish.
The ruler ship of Mars in such a case will give a husband, who will be addicted to other
women and be irascible. If Venus heads the 7th House, or its Navansa the husband will be
very beautiful and be fortunate. The husband will be skilful and knowledgeable, if Mercury be
such a planet. A sexually tormented husband, who will, however, be soft in disposition will be
bestowed by the Moon in such circumstances. The husband will be virtuous and be a
conqueror of the five senses, if Jupiter rules the 7th House, or its Navansa. Leo, as the 7th
House, or the 7th Navansa will indicate an industrious and a very intelligent husband. Thus
